title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
